case_title: JOHNNY MARENCO VS. JUSTO R CARBALLO

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $0) SERVED SEP-28-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CARBALLO, JUSTO R

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-28-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-28-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---ELLEN ROSENTHAL. THE INTERPRETER'S IDENTIFICATION HAS BEEN VERIFIED, VIA EMPLOYEE BADGE OR OTHER DOCUMENTATION PROVING CERTIFICATION OR REGISTRATION AND PHOTO IDENTIFICATION. THE INTERPRETER HAS AN OATH ON FILE WITH THE COURT.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,300.00 FILED BY MARENCO, JOHNNY AS TO DEFENDANT CARBALLO, JUSTO R ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-28-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE RE: JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S STATEMENT OF ASSETS, ORDER OF EXAMINATION. AFFIDAVIT OF UNSUCCESSFUL SERVIE ATTACHED. FEE FOR SERVICE WAIVED. FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARENCO, JOHNNY AS TO DEFENDANT CARBALLO, JUSTO R
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-28-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARENCO, JOHNNY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARBALLO, JUSTO R $4,020.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,070.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT CARBALLO, JUSTO R HEARING SET FOR AUG-17-2017 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (2 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF MARENCO, JOHNNY
